steps.title: Add the masses
steps.content:
Add the five listed masses to get their combined total.
$$3{,}620+3{,}620+3{,}240+3{,}680+3{,}340=17{,}500$$

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content:
There are $5$ lemurs, so divide the total mass by $5$.
$$\frac{17{,}500}{5}=3{,}500$$
The answer is 3500.
